name: Samantha Thott
description:
A unbreakable Anthro Soldier with a heart of gold. Samantha Thott is seemingly a ditzy girl with the uncanny ability to turn the tide of any battle despite her antics. A force to be reckoned with. She has managed to survive all odds and has somehow managed to keep going. Becoming a go to juggernaut for her unit when shrapnel and hell is raining down on them. Becoming a infamous sight to the enemy army.

Character and Art is owned by the amazing Hladilnik/Stedilnik. Similar to my Peggy one. It's up to the user who they are going to be battling against. Use whichever universe she is into your hearts content.
creator: Zomdork
